title: The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Shadowsecrets.jpg]] |title=''The Secrets of Star Wars:
Shadows of the Empire'' |author=[[Mark Cotta Vaz]] |cover artist= |illustrator=[[Alex Jay]] {{C|Designer}} |editor=*[[Steve Saffel]] *[[Allan Kausch]] *[[Alex Klapwald]] {{C|Production Manager}} |publisher=[[Del Rey]] |release date=[[May]] [[1996]]{{InsiderCite|29|Lucasfilm's Latest}} |type=Paperback |pages=299 |dimensions=9.2 x 7.4 x 0.9 inches |weight=1.21 pounds |isbn=0-345-40236-7 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire''''' is a [[1996]] reference book written by [[Mark Cotta Vaz]]. Structured like a "making of" book typically written for a film, the book covers the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Shadows of the Empire'']] multimedia campaign. It explains the origins and development of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|novel]], [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (comic series)|comics]], [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|video game]], and [[Shadows of the Empire (soundtrack)|soundtrack]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Between ''The Empire Strikes Back'' and ''Return of the Jedi'', the galaxy was plunged into the shadows . . .'' ''STAR WARS: SHADOWS OF THE EMPIRE'' ''The minds behind the ''Star Wars'' galaxy have created a phenomenon of epic proportions, designed to unfold in nearly every medium at their disposal. This intensely researched volume guides you through this ''Star Wars'' event--as its creators reveal the secrets behind the multimedia release of the year. The tendrils of this dark drama will reach throughout the ''Star Wars'' galaxy:'' ''*The evil crimelord Xizor challenges the power of Darth Vader in an exciting new novel of Imperial intrigue.'' ''*Princess Leia, Lando, and Dash Rendar launch an all-out attempt to rescue Han Solo in a state-of-the-art Nintendo video game.'' ''*Xizor's agents search the galaxy for Luke Skywalker in the taut comic book mini-series. Their mission: kill the son of Vader.'' ''*The secrets of the Imperial homeworld are revealed in brilliantly painted trading cards.'' ''*A fully orchestrated soundtrack and exciting new ''Star Wars'' action figures embellish the adventure.'' ''STAR WARS: THE SECRETS OF SHADOWS OF THE EMPIRE provides the official guide to the heroes, the villains, and all the major combatants.'' ''When this war is over, only one will control the Empire's violent'' ''underworld. . . .'' ==Contents== *Introduction: American Pop *Part 1: [[Star Wars Legends|THE EXPANDING UNIVERSE]] **The ''Shadows'' Tale **Galactic Lore *Part 2: CONJURING **[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|Novel]] Ideas **[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (comic series)|Comics]] Strip **Shadow Art **[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|Game]] Machine *Part 3: JOURNEY INTO DARKNESS **Empire and Underworld **The Dark Prince **[[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] versus [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] **Rebel Force **[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]], [[Droid/Legends|Droids]], and Bikers *Part 4: BATTLE ZONES **Power Up! **Battleships **War Games **The Final Battle *Part 5: SHADOW PLAY **Gathering of the Tribes **The Toy Shop **[[Shadows of the Empire (soundtrack)|Music of the ''Shadows'']] **Dark Designs *Part 6: **''Shadows'' Guide **Characters, Locations, and Vehicles **''Star Wars'' references **Credits ==Continuity== The book (p. 264) wrongly mentions that the final thirty cards of the [[1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|1996 Topps ''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']] collection would feature artwork inspired from scenes of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (comic series)|comic series]] and the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|video game]].''The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' In reality these were only eleven: cards 89-94 were inspired from the comic series and cards 95-100 from the game.{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|parent=1}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire}} {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |organisms=
